description: Phase 3 B1 panel-efficiency curated airfoil set — 20 geometrically-diverse airfoils spanning thickness, camber, and LE/TE feature variety. Used by ParallelPolarCompare --panel-efficiency.
notes: Selig entries are .dat paths relative to the repository root.
- s1223: aggressive high-lift low-Re airfoil (Selig, UIUC) — sharp LE, high camber.
- clarky: 11.7% cambered flat-bottom (Clark Y) — historical reference.
- ah79k135: Althaus — 13.5% thick, 3.9% camber, known high-alpha behavior.
- rg15: Roncz FAI-soaring airfoil — near-laminar design.
- ag35: Drela Allegro-class — thin, cambered, low-Re model glider.
- ag45c03: Drela Allegro — slight camber variation from ag35.
- s1010: NREL-style thick aerofoil — 19% thick, 7% camber.
